hero.title:
Detect infectious
diseases earlier.
hero.description: DiagInfect analyses routine biological markers with AI to deliver infection risk scores before culture results arrive — giving clinicians a critical head start.

features.title: Everything your clinical team needs
features.description: Built around the real workflows of doctors, lab technicians, and hospital managers — not the other way around.

ai.title: Early risk assessment
ai.description: Machine learning models (Random Forest, XGBoost, Neural Networks) trained on real infectious disease datasets deliver risk scores in under 2 seconds — before culture results are available.

lab.title: Seamless lab workflow
lab.description: Bidirectional data flow between doctors and lab technicians. CRP, CBC, ESR, and NFS results link directly to patient records with anomaly alerts built in.

xai.title: Decisions you can trust
xai.description: Every prediction comes with a ranked explanation of the contributing factors. Clinical trust requires transparency — not a black box.

rbac.title: Built for the whole team
rbac.description: Separate, optimised panels for doctors, lab technicians, and hospital managers. Each role sees exactly what it needs, nothing more.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.description: Start free. Scale when you are ready.

trial.name: Trial
trial.description: Full platform access with no commitment.

clinic.name: Private Clinic
clinic.description: For private clinics and small practices.

cta.title:
Transform your infectious disease
diagnostic workflow today.
cta.description: Join hospitals already using DiagInfect to improve patient outcomes with AI-powered infection risk assessment.

vision.statement: To become the leading AI-driven infectious disease diagnostic ecosystem in Africa and the MENA region, enabling faster, smarter, and more accessible healthcare decisions while supporting global efforts against antimicrobial resistance and emerging infectious diseases.

about.heroTitle: AI diagnostics built for the realities of clinical work.
about.heroDescription: DiagInfect-AI is an innovative healthcare platform that leverages artificial intelligence to support the early detection of bacterial infections through the analysis of biological and laboratory parameters. Our mission is to help healthcare professionals make faster and more accurate diagnostic decisions, improving patient outcomes while advancing the future of intelligent healthcare.
about.missionP1: Infectious disease diagnosis is time-critical. Every hour of delay carries real clinical consequences — delayed treatment, inappropriate antibiotics, worse outcomes.
about.missionP2: DiagInfect gives clinicians a powerful second opinion: one that synthesises symptoms, lab data, and patient history in seconds, with full transparency about how the conclusion was reached.

input.label: Input
input.description: CRP, CBC, ESR, NFS, temperature, clinical indicators

analyse.label: Analyse
analyse.description: Random Forest, XGBoost, and Neural Network ensemble

output.label: Output
output.description: Infection risk score + ranked factor explanations

accuracy.title: Accuracy first
accuracy.description: Every model is rigorously validated before deployment. Clinical safety is non-negotiable.

clinician.title: Clinician-centered
clinician.description: Built with and for clinicians — our workflows mirror how hospitals actually operate.

xai.title: Explainable AI
xai.description: We don't just give predictions — we explain them, building trust between AI and clinicians.

learning.title: Continuous learning
learning.description: Our models improve over time with anonymised feedback from real clinical outcomes.

about.ctaTitle: Ready to see it in action?
about.ctaDescription: Start a 14-day free trial with full platform access.
